descriptionShort: Jim Gunn interview filmed at the 2025 Richmond Sockeyes banner-night and Hall of Fame celebration event.
descriptionLong: Interview with Jim Gunn conducted during the 2025 Richmond Sockeyes banner-night and BC Hockey Hall of Fame commemoration. Gunn was a key member of the 1987 Centennial Cup championship team. The interview likely covers his memories of the team's success, career trajectory after Richmond, and reflections on the historical significance of the 1987 season.
